work_package_result.summary: Implemented and owner-approved the first native Project Chat workbench: an achromatic Tauri/React shell with Windows 11 Mica, project-scoped navigation, session-isolated fixture and draft state, keyboard-accessible composer controls, deterministic material states and a read-only resource workspace.

passed: 20 desktop component and accessibility tests cover every fixture state, session-scoped Stop/messages/unsent drafts, A-to-B-to-A switching, project and chat creation, keyboard composition, focus containment and restoration, open-dialog axe checks, material fallbacks and truthful deferred controls
desktop TypeScript typecheck and production Vite build passed at exact reviewed commit 3de0196cb1849f0467d2b9b7af91f729ea561ede
Tauri shell unit test covers the Windows 11 Mica build boundary; capability-probe tests cover pending, unavailable, rejected and available states with a fail-closed opaque startup
official Tauri release build without installer bundling passed and produced apps/desktop/src-tauri/target/release/dennett-desktop-shell.exe
mise exec -- just check passed repository, documentation, planning, generated metadata, Rust, Python, TypeScript and protocol gates at exact repair commit 511da3312cbe714510560a20ff484ba7e12ed9a1
owner reviewed the native release window live and accepted the screen on 2026-07-19
GitHub Fast Gate run 71 passed at merge-ready head 9e1cd7f51e42768d490261536ef7f5069a92f0c3 before PR #12 merged as 9e0db1d5a866611bdf5fb1c03fc4e8266f8825a2
not_run: real dennett-node, authenticated IPC, durable session restoration and provider streaming are intentionally deferred to WP-M01-006 and WP-M01-007
installer, signed release, multi-platform native-material comparison and Tauri end-to-end automation remain later release-hardening work
Git, file, terminal, browser-network and project-folder effects remain outside M01 and are represented only by disabled or read-only fixtures

review.method: Detached read-only R2 review of the cumulative package produced two bounded repair rounds; final closure review of exact commit 3de0196cb1849f0467d2b9b7af91f729ea561ede against base 04faca1b8dd2eed8de2d517905ba7998dc88ca92 returned PASS with no open findings.
findings_closed: Scoped fixture, Stop, sent-message and unsent-draft state by session and added A-to-B-to-A regression coverage
Made reduced-transparency rules override native Mica layers and added a fail-closed opaque fallback when Mica is pending, unavailable or rejected
Added truthful ARIA popup state, focus entry and Escape focus restoration for context and plugin dialogs with open-state accessibility checks
Regenerated canonical repository metadata and corrected the visible current owner contract from v3 to v5
Preserved conservative visual evidence: owner live acceptance is recorded without claiming a persisted final screenshot

observability_changes: visible fixture status and a bounded polite live region distinguish loading, streaming, stopped, timed-out, stale, resyncing, empty and restored presentation states without token-level announcements
native material capability failure changes only a local CSS fallback class and does not expose machine details or user content
known_limitations: the screen is a deterministic M01 renderer; its commands do not yet cross authenticated IPC or call the real Codex runtime
project creation and existing-folder choices are truthful local previews and do not mutate the filesystem
the provisional monochrome icon is not approved branding and further visual polish is deferred
follow_up_candidates: Figma-first visual polish before later substantial screen or material revisions
release-wide native accessibility and cross-platform material verification
